title: cephalotaxus oliveri
intro: Cephalotaxus oliveri, also known as Oliver's plum yew, is a species of coniferous plant in the yew family, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cephalotaxus oliveri include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are available in some health food stores and online.
